element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Tutorial-like introduction to maneuvering and shooting mechanics
Encountered throughout game to upgrade offensive capabilities
Cancel enemy fire and deal wide-area damage; strategic tool for managing threat
Escalated challenge at stage conclusions; pattern recognition required
Both players shooting each other's craft generates special projectiles; requires coordination
Stages progress with increasing difficulty; enemy volume and pattern complexity grows
Risk-reward mechanic: dying triggers power-up drops but costs a life
Fighter destruction creates damaging projectiles; turning death into offensive opportunity
Reference to Seibu's Wiz; optional collectible with high difficulty

element_introduction_order.element: Loop mode (Stage 1 restart with increased difficulty)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Infinite scaling difficulty; tests mastery of all prior mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Obtaining bomb pickup (safety valve against projectile spam)
typical_tension_triggers: Sustained barrage of enemy projectiles requiring dodging
Low health state with no power-ups visible
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Graduated escalation across 8 stages with cyclical tension-relief through enemy waves punctuated by boss encounters. Each stage builds on prior mechanics with increased enemy count and pattern complexity. Loop mode creates infinite tension scaling.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Collectible items (medals, power-ups) scattered throughout stages; Miclus and Fairy are optional/conditional pickups

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stage 1-2: Introduction to basic enemy patterns, weapon pickups, and bomb mechanics. Safe learning environment with moderate enemy density.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stage 3-5: Sustained increase in enemy formations, more aggressive projectile patterns, boss complexity escalation. Cooperative synergy becomes critical in multiplayer.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 6-8: High enemy density, complex boss attack patterns, sustained projectile barrages requiring advanced dodging. Loop mode resets to Stage 1 but with all difficulties amplified.
notable_spikes: Stage 2 transition: First noticeable jump in enemy count
Stage 5-6 boundary: Projectile density becomes overwhelming without proper positioning
Stage 8 boss: Final challenge before loop escalation
Loop mode Stage 1+: Difficulty multiplication effect when returning to early stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage follows enemy wave encounters leading to a boss battle at stage end. Waves increase in density and pattern complexity as stage progresses.
Continuous vertical scrolling with player-controlled fighter confined to screen boundaries. Enemies approach from above in waves; no horizontal scrolling or multi-directional movement.
Weapon upgrades and bombs appear strategically spaced; their absence creates tension windows where player must survive with current loadout.
Game over allows credit insertion to resume at last checkpoint (stage) reached. Enables skill progression without total restart; reduces frustration at later stages.
